auth.title: Sign In
auth.subtitle: Sign in to add menus, save favorites, and create lists
auth.termsNotice: By continuing, you agree to our {{terms}} and {{privacy}}.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign out and sign in again.

claim.submittedMessage: Your payment was received and your ownership claim is under review. After we reach you using the contact info for your business on Google Maps, your restaurant ownership will be approved.
claim.alreadyClaimedMessage: An ownership claim already exists for this business.
claim.infoBody:
Claim your business to manage menus, update contact info, and get a verified blue badge.

• Fee: $49.99 USD/month (per restaurant)
• Payment is processed by Apple
• Subscription auto-renews monthly

Verification process:
We will contact you through the business contact info registered on Google Maps to verify ownership.

⚠️ Payment is non-refundable even if ownership is not approved. Cancel: Settings > Apple ID > Subscriptions.
claim.submitWithSub: Submit claim (payment already recorded for this business)
claim.storeLoadError: Could not load subscription ({{productId}}). Please check your connection.
claim.storeLoadErrorDetail: {{productId}} could not be loaded from the store. On TestFlight or a slow connection, wait and try again.
claim.loginRequired: You need to sign in to claim a business.
claim.paymentFailed: Payment could not be completed. Claim was not submitted.
claim.requiresFreshStore: Your previous ownership claim was rejected. To submit a new claim you must complete the store purchase step again (an active subscription alone is not enough).
claim.oneBusinessOnlyBody: A user can only own one business!
claim.monthlyRetryBody: A claim for another business was rejected this month. You cannot start a claim for a different business in the same calendar month; try again next month or contact support.
claim.pendingNoticeBody: You already submitted an ownership claim for this business; it is pending review. No further payment step is needed.
claim.subscriptionRenewalNote: Note: Your subscription renewing each month in the App Store is not treated as a new in-app purchase step. It does not replace the store flow required after a rejected claim.

report.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to report this menu?
